nasb.text: When His disciples James and John saw this, they said, “Lord, do You want us to command fire to come down from heaven and consume them?”

esv.text: And when his disciples James and John saw it, they said, “Lord, do you want us to tell fire to come down from heaven and consume them?”

cnv.text: 他的門徒雅各、約翰看見了，就說：“主啊，你要我們吩咐火從天降下來，燒滅他們嗎？”

ccb.text: 祂的门徒雅各和约翰见状，说：“主啊，你要我们叫天上的火降下来烧死他们吗？”

csbs.text: 门徒雅各和约翰看见了，就说：“主啊，你要我们吩咐火从天上降下来烧灭他们吗？”
